# CWE-270 — Privilege Context Switching Error (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-270-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// Vulnerable: elevates to maintenance user but never restores caller context.
func RunMaintenanceJob(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	c.Set("effective_user", "root")
	db.Exec("DELETE FROM stale_sessions")
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"done": true})
}
